repositoryName.title: Repository Name
repositoryName.description: The name of the ECR repository containing this image

imageTags.description: The tags associated with the container image

imageDigest.title: Image Digest
imageDigest.description: The sha256 digest of the image manifest

imagePushedAt.description: The date and time the image was pushed to the repository

artifactMediaType.description: The media type of the artifact associated with the image

vulnerabilityCount.title: Vulnerability Count
vulnerabilityCount.description: Total number of vulnerabilities found in the image
